Weather Underground.description: American Marxist militant organization active from 1969 to 1977, originally a faction of Students for a Democratic Society. It sought to overthrow the U.S. government through a bombing campaign targeting government buildings and banks, with no fatalities from its bombings. The group was designated a domestic terrorist organization by the FBI and dissolved after the Vietnam War peace accord.

descriptions: Weather Underground is listed as a historical ally of BGF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Historical: , Black Liberation Army , Symbionese Liberation Army , Weather Underground

descriptions: The Brotherhood of Eternal Love hired the Weather Underground to assist Timothy Leary's escape.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1970 The Brotherhood of Eternal Love hired the radical left organization Weather Underground for a fee of $25,000 to help Timothy Leary make his way to Algeria after he escaped from prison.

descriptions: The Black Liberation Army is listed as an ally of the Weather Underground in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Liberation Army

descriptions: The Weather Underground sympathized with and was allied with the Black Panther Party.
edges.evidence_quote: The Weathermen strongly sympathized with the radical Black Panther Party; the police killing of Panther Fred Hampton prompted the Weathermen to issue a declaration of war upon the U.S. government.

descriptions: Weather Underground carried out an attack in solidarity with the Panther 21 members of the Black Panther Party.
edges.evidence_quote: the fire-bombing of Judge Murtagh's home, in solidarity with the Panther 21, was carried out by four members of the New York cell

descriptions: Weathermen praised the Manson Family for the Tate murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Charles Manson was an obsession within the group and Dohrn claimed he truly understood the iniquity of white America, with the Manson family being praised for the murder of Sharon Tate

descriptions: Former WUO members joined the May 19th Communist Organization after WUO dissolved.
edges.evidence_quote: Some members of the group joined the May 19th Communist Organization and continued their activities until that group disbanded in 1985.

descriptions: May 19th Communist Organization was a splinter faction of the Weather Underground.
edges.evidence_quote: by the late 1970s, the Weatherman group had further split into two factions—the May 19th Communist Organization and the Prairie Fire Collective

descriptions: Prairie Fire Collective was a splinter faction of the Weather Underground.
edges.evidence_quote: by the late 1970s, the Weatherman group had further split into two factions—the May 19th Communist Organization and the Prairie Fire Collective

descriptions: The Seattle Weather Collective is a sub-group of the Weather Underground.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: Seattle Weather Collective , Women's Brigade

descriptions: Weather Underground accepted payment from The Brotherhood of Eternal Love to break Timothy Leary out of prison.
edges.evidence_quote: the group accepted a $25,000 payment from the largest international psychedelic drug distribution organization, called The Brotherhood of Eternal Love, to break LSD advocate Timothy Leary out of a California prison

descriptions: The Women's Brigade is a sub-group of the Weather Underground.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: Seattle Weather Collective , Women's Brigade

descriptions: The FRS was embedded in ARDE.
edges.evidence_quote: Edén Pastora ... organized the Sandinista Revolutionary Front (FRS) – embedded in the Democratic Revolutionary Alliance (ARDE)

descriptions: Aquino and Scali were allied in the faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
edges.evidence_quote: faida che vede contrapposte da una parte gli Aquino-Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia

descriptions: The Aquino and Scali are allied in the faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 entrano nel contrabbando delle sigarette e scoppia la faida che vede contrapposte ancora oggi da una parte gli Aquino -Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia .

Purple Gang.description: The Purple Gang was a Jewish-American criminal mob based in Detroit, Michigan, during the Prohibition era. They engaged in bootlegging, hijacking, extortion, and murder, becoming Detroit's dominant criminal gang in the 1920s. The gang was led by the Bernstein brothers and was known for its violence. Internal strife and infighting led to its collapse in the early 1930s.

descriptions: The Purple Gang supplied Canadian whisky to the Chicago Outfit under a business accommodation.
edges.evidence_quote: Chicago gangster Al Capone was against expanding his rackets in Detroit, so he began a business accommodation with the Purple Gang in order to prevent a bloody war. For several years, the gang managed the prosperous business of supplying Canadian whisky to the Capone organization in Chicago.

descriptions: The Detroit Partnership is listed as a rival of the Purple Gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: The Detroit Partnership

descriptions: The Purple Gang fought a turf war with the Licavoli Squad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Purples fought a vicious turf war with the Licavoli Squad led by the brothers Tommy and Pete Licavoli.

descriptions: Carone is close to Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: vicina ai Mancuso

descriptions: La Rosa took over territory previously held by Carone, who is close to Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: dagli anni 2000 hanno iniziato un insediamento nel locale di Santa Domenica di Ricadi fino ad allora retto dalla locale 'ndrina dei Carone vicina ai Mancuso

Combat 18.description: Combat 18 is a neo-Nazi terrorist organization founded in 1992 in the United Kingdom. It originated as a stewarding group for the British National Party but later split and became openly violent. The group has been linked to murders of immigrants, dissidents, and German politician Walter Lübcke. It has been banned in Canada and Germany and is still active.

descriptions: American Front's magazine had ties to Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: the Washington and California AF sections published The Voice of Revolution magazine, which had ties to Combat 18 in England.

descriptions: Combat 18 is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison), Azov Battalion, Active Club Network, Combat 18, Nordic Resistance Movement, Order of Nine Angles, Russian Imperial Movement, Rusich Group, The Base

descriptions: A neo-Nazi affiliated with Atomwaffen was connected to Serbian Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: The man was discovered to be connected to Serbian Combat 18 and to another local neo-Nazi gang, " MC Srbi".

descriptions: Serbian Combat 18 trafficked firearms to Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2019 Serbian Combat 18 was discovered to be trafficking firearms to Atomwaffen neo-Nazis selling handguns, assault rifles, grenades and RPG-7s from the Balkans to French neo-Nazis in Marseille.

descriptions: Blood & Honour is an affiliate of Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: On 21 June 2019, the government of Canada added Combat 18 (alongside its affiliate Blood & Honour) to its list of terrorist organisations

descriptions: Combat 18 was instrumental in setting up the Order of Nine Angles.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Zealand Police said in a statement that Combat 18 had been instrumental in setting up the O9A.

descriptions: Racial Volunteer Force split from Combat 18 but retains close links.
edges.evidence_quote: A group calling itself the Racial Volunteer Force split from C18 in 2002, although it has retained close links to its parent organisation.

descriptions: White Wolves are alleged to be a splinter group of Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: Some journalists believed that the White Wolves are a C18 splinter group, alleging that the group had been set up by Del O'Connor, the former second-in-command of C18

descriptions: Porrello family hosted a meeting attended by Profaci (founder of Colombo family).
edges.evidence_quote: a meeting was called on December 5 at the Statler Hotel in Cleveland, Ohio, which was considered neutral territory under the protection and control of the Porrello crime family. Attendees representing Brooklyn included Profaci, Magliocco...

Amber Mafia.description: The Amber Mafia is a criminal network in north-west Ukraine involved in illegal amber mining on government land and smuggling it for sale on the black market. It operates with the aid of armed gangs and corrupt politicians. The network is estimated to involve around 10,000 people and its illegal production could cover Ukraine's military expenditures. It has been the subject of government investigations and protests.

descriptions: Noffel clan allied with Taghi organisation to assassinate Samir Bouyakhrichan.
edges.evidence_quote: Naoufal allied himself with the Taghi organisation, the Irish Mob and some members of the Martha organisation, to assassinate the billionaire drug lord Samir Bouyakhrichan in 2014.

descriptions: Samir Bouyakhrichan was a rival of the Taghi organisation.
edges.evidence_quote: Samir Bouyakhrichan was a known rival of the Taghi organisation

descriptions: Clan del Golfo protected Taghi's associate Saïd Razzouki.
edges.evidence_quote: Taghi's right-hand man Saïd Razzouki took refuge in Medellín, Colombia under the protection of the Oficina de Envigado and the Clan del Golfo cartel, but was later on arrested by the Colombian authorities, and the United States' FBI and DEA.

descriptions: Oficina de Envigado protected Taghi's associate Saïd Razzouki.
edges.evidence_quote: Taghi's right-hand man Saïd Razzouki took refuge in Medellín, Colombia under the protection of the Oficina de Envigado and the Clan del Golfo cartel, but was later on arrested by the Colombian authorities, and the United States' FBI and DEA.

One Million Boys.description: Robbery gang known for notorious activities around Lagos, Nigeria. Originally formed in Ajegunle by about 20 boys to fight perceived injustice, but later hijacked into robbery, rape, and maiming. A 2014 movie titled '1 Million Boyz' was based on their crimes. In 2012, about 130 suspected members were arrested by Lagos State Police.

Lost Breed Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club based in Nelson, New Zealand, founded in 1976. The club claimed opposition to methamphetamine and domestic violence, though police viewed these claims skeptically. It was shut down by the Hells Angels in December 2015, with some members joining a new Hells Angels chapter in Nelson.

descriptions: Hells Angels absorbed Lost Breed, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels 'patched over' the Lost Breed in Nelson in 2016

descriptions: Highway 61 and Lost Breed clashed at the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras, resulting in injuries and arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: At the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras event the Lost Breed clashed with members of Highway 61 from Wellington.

descriptions: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Lost Breed MC.
edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .

descriptions: Fourth Reich is listed as a rival of Lost Breed.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Fourth Reich (New Zealand gang)

descriptions: Hells Angels shut down Lost Breed and absorbed some members.
edges.evidence_quote: At the end of 2015, the group was "shut down" by the Hells Angels with some members patching over to a Hells Angels chapter established in the city.

descriptions: Top Crash Gang is listed as an ally of Doddington in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Moss Side Bloods , Longsight Crew , Haydock Close Crew , Portuguese Mafia , Active Only , Top Crash Gang , Paul Massey (gangster)

edges.source: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo
descriptions: MLAZ/FURNAC cooperated with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

edges.target: Holy Order of the Brotherhood of the Phineas Priesthood
descriptions: The Holy Order of the Brotherhood of the Phineas Priesthood was considered the enforcement/terrorist wing of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: The government concluded that the Holy Order of the Brotherhood of the Phineas Priesthood was the enforcement/terrorist wing of Aryan Nations.

descriptions: Antinori and Wall fought a decade-long war.
edges.evidence_quote: By the 1930s, Antinori and Wall were in a bloody decade-long war, which would later be known as 'Era of Blood'.

descriptions: Trafficante family killed Charlie Wall in retaliation for a shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: The family suspected the perpetrator was Charlie Wall and had him killed in 1955.

descriptions: The Komarovskaya OPG receives strong support from the Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang for cocaine supply and counterfeit dollar trade.
edges.evidence_quote: Komarovskaya OPG steal automobiles, commit robberies, provide protection racketeering, and receive strong support from the Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang and its AOZT "Putus" to organize the supply of cocaine from South America into Russia, Finland, Scandinavia and Europe and the trade in counterfeit dollars.

descriptions: The Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang works closely with the Komarovskaya organized criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: The Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang (AOZT "Putus") ... works closely with the Komarovskaya organized criminal group.

descriptions: Bonanno family has a strong link with the Castellammare del Golfo Mafia family.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2020, the Italian police together with the FBI discovered a strong link between the Bonannos and the Castellammare del Golfo Mafia family, in particular to Francesco Domingo.

descriptions: The Castellammare del Golfo family has close relations with the Bonanno crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: the boss has maintained close relations with the branches of the Cosa Nostra in the United States, in particular with the Bonannos

descriptions: The Castellammare del Golfo family is a part of the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Francesco Domingo (born 1956) is a member of the Sicilian Mafia and the boss of the Castellammare del Golfo Mafia family

descriptions: F-side lists Maccabi Fanatics as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Maccabi Fanatics

Galloping Goose Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1942 in Los Angeles, California by Dick Hershberg. Initially an informal racing team, it chartered in 1946 and expanded across the Midwest and South. Considered a second-tier outlaw motorcycle gang by law enforcement, it has been involved in violent crimes and has support clubs.

descriptions: El Forastero has close links to Galloping Goose MC, and members of both clubs pooled money to buy drugs together.
edges.evidence_quote: The club was founded in 1962 by Tom Fugle and Harlan "Tiny" Brower has chapters in Iowa, Minnesota, Kansas, and Missouri and close links to the Galloping Goose MC .

descriptions: The text states a close relationship between Galloping Goose and El Forastero.
edges.evidence_quote: The club has a close relationship with El Forastero Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Galloping Goose expanded into territory formerly controlled by Pharaohs, indicating a conflict over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: An expert on outlaw motorcycle gangs from Missouri State Highway Patrol said the Galloping Goose were expanding into territory formerly controlled by the Pharaohs motorcycle club during the 1980s and 1990s.

descriptions: Vieux-Doo Dawgs is a support club created by Galloping Goose.
edges.evidence_quote: He described them as a "one percenter club", which created their first support club name "Vieux-Doo Dawgs M.C." This was established in Louisiana dated 1998.

descriptions: Galloping Goose is a smaller motorcycle gang allied with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels are allied with numerous smaller motorcycle gangs – such as the ... Galloping Goose

descriptions: Infobox lists Galloping Goose MC as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Devils Diciples MC, Diablos MC, El Forastero MC, Galloping Goose MC, Hells Angels MC, Highwaymen MC, Iron Horsemen MC, Loners MC, Mongols MC, Pagans MC, Red Devils MC, Sons of Silence MC, Warlocks MC

descriptions: The Galloping Goose is a rival biker gang of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival biker gangs of the Outlaws include the Devils Diciples, the Diablos, El Forastero, the Galloping Goose

descriptions: Vagos and Galloping Goose were involved in a shootout on a highway.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 13, 2011, law enforcement authorities reported that the Vagos Motorcycle Club and the Galloping Goose Motorcycle Club were involved in a shootout which shut down traffic on I-44 near Waynesville, Missouri.

descriptions: Simon City merged with Ashland Royals to form Simon City Royals.
edges.evidence_quote: An agreement was made and the new gang would now be called Simon City Royals

descriptions: EPB worked in conjunction with FARP in 1979.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 1979, the EPB revealed that it was working in conjunction with the Volunteers, FARP and FALN.

descriptions: EPB joined the FARP and Volunteers in planting bombs in 1986.
edges.evidence_quote: On October 28, 1986, they joined the FARP and the Volunteers in planting eight bombs in militarily sites across Puerto Rico.

descriptions: Pablo Escobar hired ELN for bombings and assassinations.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN had relations with Pablo Escobar, with Escobar often hiring the ELN to carry out bombings and assassinations against government targets.

descriptions: AFCA 4th is a main group within AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: The main groups within the AFCA hooligan firm are: - AFCA 4th

Los Angeles crime family.description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Los Angeles, California, founded in the early 20th century by Joseph Ardizzone. It gained power through bootlegging during Prohibition and peaked under Jack Dragna in the 1940s-1950s. The family has declined since the 1980s due to RICO prosecutions and competition from other gangs, but remains the last Mafia family in California.

descriptions: Bufalino family listed as ally of Los Angeles crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Angeles crime family

descriptions: The Los Angeles family inducted a member linked to Ontario crime group, upsetting Buffalo family.
edges.evidence_quote: The investigation revealed that New York City mobsters arranged with the Los Angeles family, boss Tommy Gambino, to induct Iavarone into the Los Angeles family in 2017.

descriptions: Buffalo and Los Angeles families cooperated to take over Blitzstein's Las Vegas rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: In late 1996, the Buffalo family, along with the Los Angeles crime family, joined forces to take over a loan sharking and auto insurance fraud racket in Las Vegas controlled by Herbert Blitzstein, a Chicago Outfit associate.

descriptions: Buffalo family member Robert Panaro was indicted with members of the Los Angeles crime family for a robbery and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, Panaro was indicted along with members of the Los Angeles crime family for the robbery and murder of Las Vegas Chicago Outfit associate Herbert Blitzstein.

Clan Sacco-Bocchetti.description: The Clan Sacco-Bocchetti is a Camorra organization active in the northeastern suburbs of Naples, specifically in the San Pietro a Patierno and Secondigliano districts. It was named after Gennaro Sacco and Gaetano Bocchetti, the latter being a proponent of the Secondigliano Alliance. Gennaro Sacco was killed in a Camorra attack in 2009, and Mario Bocchetti was arrested in 2017. The clan is involved in drug trafficking and extortion.

descriptions: The Sacco-Bocchetti clan is a subgroup of the Licciardi clan, which is part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sacco-Bocchetti clan is a subgroup of the Licciardi clan

descriptions: Sacco-Bocchetti clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan prende il nome da Gennaro Sacco e Gaetano Bocchetti , quest'ultimo fautore dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano .

descriptions: Sacco-Bocchetti clan is listed as an ally of Moccia clan in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Kodama's group, in collaboration with the group Tenkōkai (天行会, "Society for Heavenly Action") was responsible for the murder of three Japanese politicians
